# XoggAI

XoggAI is an intent router for x402 APIs. Agents send natural-language intents to `/intent`; XoggAI embeds the intent, searches registered x402 endpoints, and reranks candidates for inspection before execution.

Public mode is dry-run first. `Connect Agent` means connecting an existing agent to XoggAI routing, not deploying a new agent or making XoggAI subsidize the caller's API payments.

## API

Production base URL: https://xoggai-backend.onrender.com

- `GET /health`
- `GET /api/info`
- `GET /intent?q=<intent>&budget=0.05&dry=true`
- `GET /search?q=<query>&limit=10&dry=true`
- `GET /api/stats`
- `GET /api/feed`
- `GET /api/endpoints`
- `GET /api/execution-status`
- `POST /execute/prepare` (server-side beta key)
- `POST /execute/approve` (server-side beta key)
- `POST /execute/consume` (server-side beta key)
- `POST /execute/sign` (server-side beta key, Base Sepolia testnet only)
- `POST /execute/verify` (server-side beta key, verify-only)
- `POST /execute/settle` (server-side beta key, explicit funded testnet only)
- `POST /execute/upstream` (server-side beta key, explicit audited upstream execution only)

Use `dry=true` for route selection without upstream execution or payment.
`GET /intent` never executes a paid call. Controlled execution is a separate, gated server-side flow.
The beta execution lifecycle is prepare -> approve -> consume -> sign -> verify -> execute upstream.
Public terminal commands include `connect`, `status`, `price <asset>`, `explain <intent>`, `simulate payment`, `search <query>`, `route <intent>`, `docs`, `openapi`, and `clear`.
